settings.heading: Light that renders colour the way your home deserves.
settings.subtext: Properly specified, fairly priced, designed for Singapore homes.

settings.title: Properly Specified
settings.text: We publish the real numbers — CRI, R9, CCT tolerance, lumens. No hidden specs, no vague claims.

settings.title: Designed for Singapore
settings.text: Built for tropical homes, HDB and condo proportions, and how Singapore rooms actually use light.

settings.title: Ra95+ Throughout
settings.text: One quality standard across every product — strip, GU10, and E27. Museum-grade colour accuracy.

settings.desc: 10-metre dotless COB at Ra95+. Warm, even, shadow-free. For coves, cabinets, and shelves.
Switch on for warm. Flip twice for crisp. Two colour temperatures, no app, no WiFi.
Fixed colour temperature, fully dimmable. Glass body, Ra95+. Choose your warmth.
For pendants, floor lamps, and table lamps. 9W, Ra95+, dimmable.

settings.heading: Most strips in Singapore are Ra80. You'll see the difference.
settings.body:
CRI measures how accurately a light renders colour. Most generic strips sit at Ra80 — skin looks slightly grey, wood loses its warmth, food looks dull.

KAYVA is Ra95+ with R9 over 50. Colours look the way they should. It's the same standard used in museums, hotels, and premium restaurants — now in your home.

settings.heading: Fewer lumens, better light.
settings.text: Ra95+ means your colours render the way they should. Skin looks alive, wood shows its grain, and food looks like food.

settings.heading: Get our Singapore lighting guide.
settings.subtext: CRI explained, Kelvin guide, and cove lighting tips for HDB and condo spaces.
